Here is a comparison of 5 AI coding tools by free plan and paid plan:

| Tool | Free Plan | Paid Plan | Actions Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GitHub Copilot | $0/month (basic) | $29/user/month (pro) | Navigate to pricing page, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll | 
| Codeium | $0/month (free) | $9.99/user/month (pro) | Navigate to pricing page, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll | 
| Tabnine | $0/month (basic) | $29/user/month (pro) | Navigate to pricing page, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll | 
| Amazon Q Developer | Free | $25/user/month (pro) | Navigate to pricing page, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll | 
| Cursor | $0/month (free) | $9.99/user/month (pro) | Navigate to pricing page, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll |

Note: Prices may vary based on the user's location and other factors.
